_doc: Stage 12 input contract for consensus to validation. Validated against runProductFinalizationDerivation() and createProductFinalizationDerivationRuntime() on 2026-03-17.
producer: runProductFinalizationDerivation() after identity consensus and normalization bootstrap
transform_sequence: Apply component prior fills and track componentPriorFilledFields.
Run deterministic critic normalization and rejection rules.
Run optional LLM validator for uncertain fields unless expensive finalization is skipped.
Apply inference policy, aggressive extraction, and runtime gate/curation.
Compute completeness, coverage, confidence, and validation gate outputs.
Build field reasoning, traffic light, needSet, phase07PrimeSources, phase08Extraction, and finalization metrics.
skip_behavior: If terminalReason is max_run_seconds_reached, expensive finalization disables summary writing and optional validator/aggressive passes.
NeedSet history enrichment happens here using search-plan handoff queries because the live NeedSet emitted earlier does not know the current round results.
